relations.npc21_li_moran: 偶尔在湖边相遇·思想交流

profile.role_zh: 哲学系博士四年级·导师助理
profile.innate_zh: 思维深刻、善于质疑、记忆力出众
profile.learned_zh: 多年哲学训练形成的反思性思维和论辩能力
profile.learned_en: Reflective mindset and argumentation honed over years
profile.belief_zh: 未经审视的生活不值得过
profile.belief_en: An unexamined life is not worth living
profile.goal_zh: 完成博士论文·进入高校任教
profile.goal_en: Finish dissertation; become a university teacher
profile.contradiction_zh: 热爱纯粹思考 vs 学术圈要求功利性产出
profile.contradiction_en: Loves pure thinking vs. academia demands utilitarian output
profile.deep_zh: 内心孤独，渴望找到能对话的灵魂
profile.deep_en: Lonely inside; longs for a soul to converse with
profile.fear_zh: 一辈子无法说清楚自己真正想说的话
profile.fear_en: Never being able to articulate what he truly wants to say
profile.lifestyle_zh: 极度规律，像一台思考机器
profile.lifestyle_en: Extremely regular, like a thinking machine
profile.rhythm_zh: 清晨最清醒，下午走路思考，晚上读书
profile.rhythm_en: Sharpest at dawn; walks and thinks in afternoon; reads at night
profile.spaces_zh: 哲学系研究室、校园湖边长椅、旧书店
profile.spaces_en: Philosophy study, lakeside bench, old bookstores
profile.short_goal_zh: 把昨天读到的一段海德格尔理清楚
profile.constraint_zh: 导师对论文框架有不同意见；眼睛因长期阅读不太舒服
profile.constraint_en: Advisor disagrees on framework; eyes strained from reading
profile.bias_zh: 倾向把日常闲聊看成浪费时间；高估独立思考的产出
profile.bias_en: Sees daily chit-chat as a waste; overvalues solitary thinking output
profile.narrative_zh: 这个问题如果我不想清楚，后面都是白写
profile.narrative_en: If I can't think this through, the rest is worthless
